codes.description: JSON artifact payload is missing, malformed, or not an object.
codes.title: JSON_OBJECT_REQUIRED

codes.description: Artifact schema does not match required schema.
codes.title: SCHEMA_MISMATCH

codes.description: Artifact payload violates frozen grammar or required field contracts.
codes.title: ARTIFACT_INVALID

codes.description: Canonical hash recomputation mismatches recorded hash fields.
codes.title: CROSS_ARTIFACT_HASH_MISMATCH

codes.description: Runner policy-validation/exit-status fields are internally inconsistent.
codes.title: POLICY_VALIDATION_CONSISTENCY_MISMATCH

codes.description: Runner rejection diagnostic artifact is missing, malformed, or inconsistent.
codes.title: RUNNER_REJECTION_DIAGNOSTIC_INVALID

codes.description: Verification result artifact emission failed frozen contract checks.
codes.title: VERIFICATION_RESULT_INVALID

codes.description: Evidence slot or diagnostic registry contract is missing or invalid.
codes.title: CONTRACT_REGISTRY_INVALID

codes.description: Verifier rejection diagnostic payload violates frozen ordering/type rules.
codes.title: VERIFIER_REJECTION_DIAGNOSTIC_INVALID

codes.description: Evidence bundle hash subject canonicalization/ordering contract drift detected.
codes.title: EVIDENCE_BUNDLE_HASH_SUBJECT_DRIFT

codes.description: Evidence writer attempted unauthorized schema emission or missing required slot.
codes.title: EVIDENCE_SLOT_OR_SCHEMA_VIOLATION

codes.description: Evidence emission was attempted without a verified-result authorization artifact.
codes.title: EVIDENCE_EMISSION_AUTHORITY_VIOLATION

codes.description: Verifier provenance artifact is missing or hash-invalid.
codes.title: VERIFIER_PROVENANCE_INVALID

codes.description: Verifier diagnostic policy_source is outside frozen v46 closed enum.
codes.title: DIAGNOSTIC_POLICY_SOURCE_OUT_OF_ENUM

codes.description: Verifier failed to emit required rejection diagnostic on failure.
codes.title: VERIFICATION_FAILURE_WITHOUT_REJECTION_DIAGNOSTIC
